EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT REDFEARN, GEORGE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-05-2012
MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR APR-22-2013 VACATED. DISMISSAL FILED ON 2/11/13. (206)
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT REDFEARN, GEORGE

DISCOVERY 302, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING REGARDING PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSE TO DISCOVERY, ORDER FOR THE GENUINENESS OF DOCUMENTS AND TRUTH OF MATTERS ASSERTED. THERE APPEARS TO BE NO OPPOSITION FILED ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANT GEORGE REDFEARN; ACCORDINGLY THE COURT WILL ISSUE THE FOLLOWING ORDER: (1) DEFENDANT GEORGE REDFEARN WILL FILE NO LATER THAN 15 DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER FULL RESPONSES, WITHOUT OBJECTION, TO EACH INTERROGATORY SET FORTH IN PLAINTIFF'S FIRST SET OF SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES; (2) DEFENDANT GEORGE REDFEARN WILL PRODUCE NO LATER THAN 15 DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER ALL DOCUMENTS CALLED FOR IN PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR INSPECTION AND PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS; (3) DEFENDANT GEORGE REDFEARN WILL PROVIDE WITHIN 10 DAYS OF THIS ORDER FULL RESPONSES, WITHOUT OBJECTION, TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION. TO THE EXTENT THAT HE FAILS TO DO SO THE GENUINESS OF THE DOCUMENTS AND THE TRUTH OF THE MATTERS ASSERTED IN THE REQUEST WILL BE DEEMED ADMITTED AND DEFENDANT GEORGE REDFEARN WILL BE PRECLUDED FROM OFFERING AT TRIAL ANY EVIDENCE SEEKING TO CONTRADICT SUCH ADMISSIONS. (4) PLAINTIFF IS AWARDED SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,000 AGAINST DEFENDANT GEORGE REDFEARN AND HIS COUNSEL. PLAINTIFF TO SUBMIT PROPOSED ORDER (APPROVED BY OPPOSING COUNSEL AS TO FORM AND CONTENT) TO THE COURT FOR SIGNATURE. JUDGE PRO TEM PAUL RENNE, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: RUNDQUIST, ANDREW SUBSTITUTED FOR WALSH, MARK D AS ATTORNEY FOR MIDLAND FUNDING LLC

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-29-2013 Vacated

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Response To Discovery, Order For The Genuineness Of Documents And Truth Of Matters Asserted
Off Calendar Jan-08-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: no appearances.

parties are deemed to have stipulated that the motion will be decided by the Pro Tem Judge with the same authority as a Superior Court Judge.

the court adopts its tentative ruling REGARDING PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC's Motion To Compel Response To Discovery, Order For The Genuineness Of Documents And Truth Of Matters Asserted. THERE APPEARS TO BE NO OPPOSITION FILED ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANT GEORGE REDFEARN; ACCORDINGLY THE COURT WILL ISSUE THE FOLLOWING ORDER: (1) DEFENDANT GEORGE REDFEARN WILL FILE NO LATER THAN 15 DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER FULL RESPONSES, WITHOUT OBJECTION, TO EACH INTERROGATORY SET FORTH IN PLAINTIFF'S FIRST SET OF SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES; (2) DEFENDANT GEORGE REDFEARN WILL PRODUCE NO LATER THAN 15 DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER ALL DOCUMENTS CALLED FOR IN PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR INSPECTION AND PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS; (3) DEFENDANT GEORGE REDFEARN WILL PROVIDE WITHIN 10 DAYS OF THIS ORDER FULL RESPONSES, WITHOUT OBJECTION, TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION. TO THE EXTENT THAT HE FAILS TO DO SO THE GENUINESS OF THE DOCUMENTS AND THE TRUTH OF THE MATTERS ASSERTED IN THE REQUEST WILL BE DEEMED ADMITTED AND DEFENDANT GEORGE REDFEARN WILL BE PRECLUDED FROM OFFERING AT TRIAL ANY EVIDENCE SEEKING TO CONTRADICT SUCH ADMISSIONS. (4) PLAINTIFF IS AWARDED SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,000 AGAINST DEFENDANT GEORGE REDFEARN AND HIS COUNSEL. PLAINTIFF TO SUBMIT PROPOSED ORDER (APPROVED BY OPPOSING COUNSEL AS TO FORM AND CONTENT) TO THE COURT FOR SIGNATURE.

Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, not reported.
